requirements

May not be taken on a Pass-Fail basis.

For information about general education requirements prior to the 2012-2013 academic year please email gened@umd.edu.

General Education

REQUIREMENTS Elements of the General Education Program The General Education program is comprised of courses that build foundational skills (Fundamental Studies (p. 1)), courses that expand the breadth of your education (Distributive Studies (p. 2)) and courses that explore and study human, societal and cultural differences (Diversity (p. 2)). At least two of your Distributive Studies courses will delve in to a "Big Question" as seen through the lens of a particular academic discipline (Big Question (p. 2)).
